status: height: 50px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 28px 0 24px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-primary);
top-bar: height: 48px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 16px;
tb-model: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-primary);
convo: flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; scrollbar-width: none; padding: 8px 16px 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 24px;
user-turn: align-self: flex-end; max-width: 80%; background: var(--surface); color: var(--text-primary); font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.45; padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 20px 20px 4px 20px;
ai-actions: display: flex; gap: 20px; margin-top: 12px; padding-left: 30px; color: var(--text-secondary);
thinking: display: inline-flex; gap: 6px; align-items: center; padding-left: 30px;
prompt-bar: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; min-height: 52px; background: var(--surface); border-radius: 26px; padding: 8px 14px;
send-btn: width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--blue); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0;
